introSection: Roller Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Turkish manufacturer Güven Lunapark currently located at Sandwell Valley Amusements in West Bromwich, West Midlands, England, UK. The ride is owned by UK showman Ross Kayes.
fullText:
Roller Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Turkish manufacturer Güven Lunapark currently located at Sandwell Valley Amusements in West Bromwich, West Midlands, England, UK. The ride is owned by UK showman Ross Kayes.

Yellow track and unpainted supports.
